chunks.text: Technical Reports - Prabal Dutta. Toward Pedagogically Effective AI for Introductory Computer Science (EECS-2025-119) Michael Wu. Wearable, User-Centric Sweat Sensing Platforms with Scalable Fabrication () Noelle Davis.
chunks.question: What are two technical reports listed under Prabal Dutta's page?
chunks.answer: AI for CS and sweat sensing platforms.

chunks.text: Speaking Truth to Power (EECS-2021-264) Prabal Dutta and Noah Klugman. Modular Integration Platform for Printed Electronics (EECS-2020-156) Seiya Ono.
chunks.question: Who authored the report on speaking truth to power?
